title: proteaceae
intro: The proteaceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants. It is a diverse group of plants that includes approximately 1,460 species, commonly known as the protea or sugarbush family. Members of the proteaceae family are primarily found in southern hemisphere regions, with a majority of species native to South Africa and Australia. Characteristic features of proteaceae include the presence of a distinctive inflorescence, often in the form of a flower head, and a variety of growth habits, ranging from small shrubs to large trees.
